objective: Implement two scoped agentops bd issues spawned from the 2026-05-02 RTK→Codex hook experiment: soc-mcom (parity matrix doc in docs/HOOKS.md) and soc-40w2 (CI lint scripts/test-hooks-output.sh + fixtures + validate.yml job for hook output JSON shape).
validation_commands: grep -q '### Codex/Claude PreToolUse output parity' docs/HOOKS.md

tracker_health.reason: bd context confirms dolt server backend; epic soc-hiua + children soc-mcom + soc-40w2 wired with parent-child + blocks deps

done_criteria: docs/HOOKS.md contains '### Codex/Claude PreToolUse output parity' subsection (~25 lines, after lifecycle table)
scripts/test-hooks-output.sh exists, executable, exits 0 against current hooks/, exits non-zero against negative fixture (self-test)
tests/fixtures/hook-inputs/{Bash,Edit,Read,Skill,UserPromptSubmit,TaskCompleted,Write,Glob,Grep}.json all exist with minimal valid PreToolUse stdin
.github/workflows/validate.yml contains hook-output-schema-lint job AND it appears in needs[] aggregator AND echo line in summary block
soc-mcom and soc-40w2 closed in bd
pre_mortem_amendments: 4 tactical amendments folded into soc-40w2 bd issue notes: (1) extend fixtures with Write/Glob/Grep, (2) wire CI in 3 places not just 1, (3) hook-side-effect sandboxing strategy required, (4) allow-list verified against 10 hooks as of 2026-05-02

test_levels.rationale: Doc + CI tooling change. L0 = lint passes own fixtures (positive + negative). L1 = existing CI green. No L2/L3 — no runtime behavior changed.

out_of_scope: Migration of tests/hooks/hook-stdin-contracts.bats to new lint
New bd beads beyond epic soc-hiua
Fixtures for matchers no agentops hook fires on (re-evaluated: Write/Glob/Grep ARE used; included)
